{{Quote|I've heard a few times that IG-88 is supposed to be one of the fiercest droids in the galaxy. No way. I've seen a lot of nasty droids, but HN-TR1 is a class all by himself. He would eat IG-88 for breakfast. Hell, he'd eat the whole IG series if given the chance. Why by the Core Ploovo trusts that homicidal machine with his creds is a mystery.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Derembus Sitnalta]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''HN-TR1''' was an [[HN-TR Assassin/Combat Droid Prototype|HN-TR assassin/combat droid prototype]] of unknown design and mysterious background.

==History==
The manufacturer of the [[assassin droid]] HN-TR1 is unknown, although [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] members believed that HN-TR1 was a prototype, perhaps one even designed to hunt Rebel personnel. Rumor suggested that it killed all of its design team as soon as it obtained awareness, and then destroyed its own schematics.<ref name="AIR" />

For a time, HN-TR1 "worked" by hunting rebels. HN-TR1's features included armor, a [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]] and a [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blaster]] in its left arm, [[Broadband antenna/Legends|broad-band antenna]], flamethrower and long-range and movement sensors. Rebel commander [[Derembus Sitnalta]] considered him a threat greater than [[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88]]. Around [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], HN-TR1 was hired by loanshark [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]]. Ploovo then assigned HN-TR1 to collect money from debtors in [[Ploovo's Protocol Team]]. Fellow Protocol Team member [[Lotas]], a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], admired [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] partner.<ref name="AIR" />

During the [[Glite-Ven hostilities]], HN-TR1 noticed the sadistic [[droid]] [[EV-4D9]] and expressed his interest in it, an interest shared by Lotas. Following their advice, Ploovo purchased EV-4D9, who became a new member of the Protocol Team. Lotas respected EV-4D9's darkly analytical functions.<ref name="AIR" />
